name: Vexx Development
postCreateCommand: export NVM_DIR=/usr/local/share/nvm && . "$NVM_DIR/nvm.sh" && sudo apt-get update && sudo apt-get install -y kitty-terminfo ncurses-term locales tmux curl python3 build-essential && sudo locale-gen en_US.UTF-8 && cp .devcontainer/tmux.conf ~/.tmux.conf && curl -Lo lazygit.tar.gz https://github.com/jesseduffield/lazygit/releases/download/v0.45.2/lazygit_0.45.2_Linux_x86_64.tar.gz && tar xf lazygit.tar.gz lazygit && sudo install lazygit /usr/local/bin && rm lazygit.tar.gz lazygit && npm install -g prettier @anthropic-ai/claude-code && npm install && echo 'Vexx development environment ready!'
